title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
